name: capacity-planner
description: Use when an ops leader (Director of CX, Head of Support, VP Ops, Head of BizOps, Head of IT ops, Head of Finance ops) is sizing ops capacity, building a headcount plan, modeling utilization risk, planning Q3 capacity or annual support capacity, or designing CS coverage — and needs Erlang-C queueing math, P90 demand sizing, shrinkage-adjusted FTE, manager-trigger thresholds, and a quarterly hiring sequence with ramp + attrition. Apply when sustained team utilization is above 80% or when the team
author: alirezarezvani
summary_zh: 这是一款给运营主管算人力的工具，专治团队长期超负荷运转。它结合排队论和流失率等模型，帮你精准算出到底需要多少人以及招聘节奏，避免人力短缺或过剩。
